name: Human Made × Kinsta WCEU 2026 Party
description: Human Made and Kinsta's WCEU 2026 party on the Vistula boulevard. Drinks and conversation down by the river in Kazimierz.
notes: Thu Jun 4, 2026 · 20:00–23:00 · Bulwar Kurlandzki 137, Kraków (riverside). Dustin & Shadi RSVP'd. The Jun 5 session sold out — we hold the Jun 4 ticket (entry password is in the team Slack thread). Overlaps Automattic Connect (plac Nowy 1) the same evening; both riverside / Kazimierz, ~15 min apart.
